title: Mass Email Tracking Export/Report
excerpt:
Hey folks.  Is there any way to export or generate reports from the Mass Email Tracking data either through a native Monday feature or via third-party app/plugin? 
Thanks.

posts.author: asparks (Aaron)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey folks. Is there any way to export or generate reports from the Mass Email Tracking data either through a native Monday feature or via third-party app/plugin?

Thanks.

posts.author: liambailey (Liam Bailey)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey there. I don’t think there is at the moment. What I do is on a weekly basis I take screenshots of the mass email tracking screen and upload them to ChatGPT to extract the data out into a table/csv. Not ideal but better than typing out a report manually.

posts.author: Yash.Gangani (Yash Gangani)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @asparks @liambailey

Hope you are doing well.
in monday.com there is one app called EasyMails where you can send emails though that app easily and best part is you can check status of that emails like open, sent etc.
And you can check detailed analytics on their dashboard

Screenshot 2024-10-24 at 1.15.11 PM1570×861 96.3 KB

posts.author: stratcann (Heather)
posts.cookedHtml: I don’t want to have to pay for yet another app inside my paid CRM account just to be able to export/download mass email data. I hope that Monday CRM is working on adding this feature as it’s available on all the other platforms I’ve used. Taking screenshots or manually transferring data isn’t very efficient or professional. Has there been any movement on this feature? Thanks very much!
